title: Replace profile avatar with newly uploaded gaming artwork image

requirements.summary: Replace the existing profile avatar static asset with the newly uploaded gaming artwork image
acceptanceCriteria: The new gaming artwork image is saved at frontend/public/assets/generated/profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png
The Navbar circular avatar displays the new image
The AboutSection brand profile image displays the new image
The image is cropped/resized to 512×512 pixels

file_operations.description: Replace the existing profile avatar with the newly uploaded gaming artwork image (quality_restoration_20260128182709920-1.jpg). Crop and resize to a square 512×512 portrait avatar, centered on the figure's upper body and face (masked figure in white turtleneck with Gucci cap, neon red halo, red diamond YouTube play button, and dark esports background). This file is already referenced by Navbar for the circular avatar and AboutSection for the brand profile image, so both components will automatically display the new image without code changes.
